name: odoo-precios
description: Electron + React + TypeScript + Express Desktop App

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3001/api/health && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 SKIP_INTERNAL_BACKEND=1 electron .
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:backend && npm run build:renderer
